title: Women Bringing Incredible News from Heaven
summary: “And I will put enmity between thee and the woman, and between thy seed and her seed; it shall bruise thy head, and thou shalt bruise his heel.” Gen 3:15 “And the dragon was wroth with the woman, and went to make war with the remnant of her seed, which keep the commandments of God, and have the testimony of Jesus Christ.” Rev 12:17 In the Old Testament, the Devil targeted the woman and spoke directly to Eve away from her husband, Adam. Women have suffered much throughout history – abuse, violence and prejudice for just being women. Now, however, in the New Testament, women were the first to hear the Gospel and believe. The prophecy of the seed of the woman was now being fulfilled in Nazareth. Let us remember that the Devil knew that God had anyhow planned to deliver humanity from sin through his own flesh and blood. He was aware that humans made of the dust cannot be the image of God. The real image of God is Jesus Christ, and the Devil knew he had to be born of a woman, hence the reason he targeted Eve.
